steps.title: Connect habit and motto
steps.content: The passage says Montaigne questions his own perspective throughout his essays. His motto, "What do I know?" expresses the same self-questioning attitude, so the transition should signal that the motto fits the previous idea.

steps.title: Reject mismatched transitions
steps.content: Choice B signals contrast, but the motto reinforces the point. Choice C signals present time, which is irrelevant. Choice D signals concession, but there is no obstacle or contradiction to concede. The answer is A.
